understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on a grid, navigating safely while avoiding spike tiles (`u`/`v`) that end the run immediately.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal via MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT; after each move, the player automatically falls in the current gravity direction (DOWN toward lower y, UP toward higher y) until landing on a solid tile. Clicks on breakable blocks (`x`) remove them without moving the player. Spikes cause instant failure. UNDO reverts the last action. The 50-turn limit per attempt is strict; bouncing horizontally without progressing toward a 'passage' (a landing position with different y, indicated in corridor_scan) wastes turns.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 38 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on a grid, navigating safely while avoiding spike tiles (`u`/`v`) that end the run immediately.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is strictly horizontal via MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT; after each move, the player automatically falls in the current gravity direction (DOWN toward lower y, UP toward higher y) until landing on a solid tile. Clicks on breakable blocks (`x`) remove them without moving the player. Spikes cause instant failure. UNDO reverts the last action. The 50-turn limit per attempt is strict; bouncing horizontally without progressing toward a 'passage' (a landing position with different y, indicated in corridor_scan) wastes turns.
